current_wind.description: Light wind from the Southwest, with minimal gusts.

bh.shot_strategy: RHBH - Use an anhyzer release to ride the tailwind and counter the push to the left.

fh.shot_strategy: RHFH - A hyzer angle with a stable disc can shape around obstacles.

bh.shot_strategy: LHBH - Use a hyzer release to ride the tailwind and counter the push to the right.

fh.shot_strategy: LHFH - An anhyzer angle with a stable disc can shape around obstacles.

bh.shot_strategy: RHBH - Use an anhyzer release to maximize glide with the tailwind.

fh.shot_strategy: RHFH - If control is needed, a stable disc with a hyzer angle can work.

bh.shot_strategy: LHBH - Use a hyzer release to maximize glide with the tailwind.

fh.shot_strategy: LHFH - If control is needed, a stable disc with an anhyzer angle can work.

bh.shot_strategy: RHBH - Similar to Hole 2; a neutral to understable disc on an anhyzer will get great distance.

fh.shot_strategy: RHFH - A stable disc on hyzer for control.

bh.shot_strategy: LHBH - Similar to Hole 2; a neutral to overstable disc on a hyzer will get great distance.

fh.shot_strategy: LHFH - A stable disc on an anhyzer for control.

bh.shot_strategy: RHBH - Use an anhyzer release to ride the tailwind and counter the push to the right.

fh.shot_strategy: RHFH - A hyzer angle with a stable disc can shape the shot.

bh.shot_strategy: LHBH - Use a hyzer release to ride the tailwind and counter the push to the left.

fh.shot_strategy: LHFH - An anhyzer angle with a stable disc can shape the shot.

wind_info.description: Slight headwind with slight right crosswind

bh.shot_strategy: RHBH - Flat or slight hyzer to manage the slight headwind and gentle push to the left.

fh.shot_strategy: RHFH - A slight anhyzer can counter the push right.

bh.shot_strategy: LHBH - Flat or slight anhyzer to manage the slight headwind and push to the right.

fh.shot_strategy: LHFH - A slight hyzer can counter the push left.

bh.shot_strategy: RHBH - Use an anhyzer release to ride the tailwind and counter the push to the left.

fh.shot_strategy: RHFH - A hyzer angle with a stable disc can shape the shot.

bh.shot_strategy: LHBH - Use a hyzer release to ride the tailwind and counter the push to the right.

fh.shot_strategy: LHFH - An anhyzer angle with a stable disc can shape the shot.

bh.shot_strategy: RHBH - Neutral to understable disc with an anhyzer release for maximum glide.

fh.shot_strategy: RHFH - If control is needed, a stable disc with a hyzer angle.

bh.shot_strategy: LHBH - Neutral to overstable disc with a hyzer release for maximum glide.

fh.shot_strategy: LHFH - If control is needed, a stable disc with an anhyzer angle.

wind_info.description: Slight headwind with slight left crosswind

bh.shot_strategy: RHBH - Flat or slight hyzer to manage the slight headwind and push to the left.

fh.shot_strategy: RHFH - A slight anhyzer can counter the push right.

bh.shot_strategy: LHBH - Flat or slight anhyzer to manage the slight headwind and push to the right.

fh.shot_strategy: LHFH - A slight hyzer can counter the push left.

bh.disc_recommendation: Overstable driver or stable disc with hyzer flip.
bh.shot_strategy: RHBH - Use a strong hyzer release to fight the headwind and push to the right.

fh.shot_strategy: RHFH - Consider if push right is too much for RHBH; controlled anhyzer can work.

bh.disc_recommendation: Overstable driver or stable disc with anhyzer flip.
bh.shot_strategy: LHBH - Use a strong anhyzer release to fight the headwind and push to the left.

fh.shot_strategy: LHFH - Consider if push left is too much for LHBH; controlled hyzer can work.
